lines.gurmukhi: ਨਚ ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਧਨੰ ਰੂਪੰ ਨਚ ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਸ੍ਵਰਗ ਰਾਜਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: nach duralabhan dhanan roopan nach duralabhan svarag raajanah |
lines.english: Wealth and beauty are not so difficult to obtain. Paradise and royal power are not so difficult to obtain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਰਤਨੰ ਸਾਧਸੰਗੇਣ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਹ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੰਤਿ ਜਮਦੂਤਨਹ ॥੩੪॥
lines.translit: keeratanan saadhasangen naanak neh drisattant jamadootanah |34|
lines.english: and sings the Kirtan of His Praises in the Saadh Sangat, O Nanak, shall never see the Messenger of Death. ||34||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਚ ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਸੁਤ ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਭ੍ਰਾਤ ਬਾਂਧਵ ਨਚ ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਬਿਲਾਸਹ ॥
lines.translit: nach duralabhan sut mitr bhraat baandhav nach duralabhan banitaa bilaasah |
lines.english: Children, friends, siblings and relatives are not so difficult to obtain. The pleasures of woman are not so difficult to obtain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਚ ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਭੋਜਨੰ ਬਿੰਜਨੰ ਨਚ ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਸ੍ਵਛ ਅੰਬਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: nach duralabhan bhojanan binjanan nach duralabhan svachh anbarah |
lines.english: Foods and delicacies are not so difficult to obtain. Elegant clothes are not so difficuilt to obtain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਚ ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਬਿਦਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਬੀਣੰ ਨਚ ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਚਤੁਰ ਚੰਚਲਹ ॥
lines.translit: nach duralabhan bidiaa prabeenan nach duralabhan chatur chanchalah |
lines.english: Knowledge and wisdom are not so difficult to obtain. Cleverness and trickery are not so difficult to obtain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਲਭੰ ਏਕ ਭਗਵਾਨ ਨਾਮਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਬਧੵਿੰ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੰ ॥੩੫॥
lines.translit: duralabhan ek bhagavaan naamah naanak labadhayin saadhasang kripaa prabhan |35|
lines.english: Only the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is difficult to obtain. O Nanak, it is only obtained by God's Grace, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||35||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤ ਕਤਹ ਤਤਹ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੰ ਸ੍ਵਰਗ ਮਰਤ ਪਯਾਲ ਲੋਕਹ ॥
lines.translit: jat katah tatah drisattan svarag marat payaal lokah |
lines.english: Wherever I look, I see the Lord, whether in this world, in paradise, or the nether regions of the underworld.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖਯਾ ਭਯੰਤਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੰ ਦ੍ਰੁਸਟਾਂ ਸਖਾ ਸ੍ਵਜਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: bikhayaa bhayant amritan drusattaan sakhaa svajanah |
lines.english: Poison is transformed into nectar, and enemies into friends and companions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਰਮਣੰ ਗੋਬਿੰਦਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਲੇਪ ਛੇਪ ਨ ਲਿਪੵਤੇ ॥੩੬॥
lines.translit: sarabatr ramanan gobindah naanak lep chhep na lipayate |36|
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe is All-pervading everywhere. O Nanak, no blame or stain sticks to Him. ||36||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੰ ਭਯੰਤਿ ਸੁਖੵੰ ਭੈ ਭੀਤੰ ਤ ਨਿਰਭਯਹ ॥
lines.translit: dukhan bhayant sukhayan bhai bheetan ta nirabhayah |
lines.english: Pain is changed into pleasure, and the fearful become fearless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਨ ਬਿਹੂਨ ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰਹ ॥੩੭॥
lines.translit: thaan bihoon bisraam naaman naanak kripaal har har gurah |37|
lines.english: Those who have no home or place find their place of rest in the Naam, O Nanak, when the Guru, the Lord, becomes Merciful. ||37||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਕਰਤਬ ਮਮੰ ਕਰਤਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਲੇਪ ਛੇਪ ਨ ਲਿਪੵਤੇ ॥੩੮॥
lines.translit: sarab karatab maman karataa naanak lep chhep na lipayate |38|
lines.english: The Creator of all is the Creator of me as well. O Nanak, no blame or stain sticks to Him. ||38||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਸੀਲ ਮਮੰ ਸੀਲੰ ਸਰਬ ਪਾਵਨ ਮਮ ਪਾਵਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: sarab seel maman seelan sarab paavan mam paavanah |
lines.english: He blesses all with humility; He has blessed me with humility as well. He purifies all, and He has purified me as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਸੀਤਲੰ ਸੀਤ ਰੁਤੇਣ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੀਤਲੰ ਸਾਧ ਸ੍ਵਜਨਹ ॥੩੯॥
lines.translit: neh seetalan seet ruten naanak seetalan saadh svajanah |39|
lines.english: The winter season is not cool; O Nanak, only the Holy friends, the Saints, are cool and calm. ||39||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਹ ਸੀਤਲੰ ਚੰਦ੍ਰ ਦੇਵਹ ਨਹ ਸੀਤਲੰ ਬਾਵਨ ਚੰਦਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: neh seetalan chandr devah neh seetalan baavan chandanah |
lines.english: The moon-god is not cool and calm, nor is the white sandalwood tree.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੵਾਨੰ ਸਮ ਦੁਖ ਸੁਖੰ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਿਰਵੈਰਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: gayaanan sam dukh sukhan jugat niramal niravairanah |
lines.english: Those who have the wisdom to look alike upon pleasure and pain, live the immaculate lifestyle, free of vengeance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਤ੍ਰੰ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੰ ਧੵਾਨੰ ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਪੂਰਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: mantran raam raam naaman dhayaanan sarabatr pooranah |
lines.english: Through the Mantra of the Name of the Lord, Raam, Raam, one meditates on the All-pervading Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਯਾਲੰ ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਜੀਆ ਪੰਚ ਦੋਖ ਬਿਵਰਜਿਤਹ ॥
lines.translit: dayaalan sarabatr jeea panch dokh bivarajitah |
lines.english: They are kind to all beings; they have overpowered the five thieves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੋਜਨੰ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਕੀਰਤਨੰ ਅਲਪ ਮਾਯਾ ਜਲ ਕਮਲ ਰਹਤਹ ॥
lines.translit: bhojanan gopaal keeratanan alap maayaa jal kamal rahatah |
lines.english: They take the Kirtan of the Lord's Praise as their food; they remain untouched by Maya, like the lotus in the water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਪਦੇਸੰ ਸਮ ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਸਤ੍ਰਹ ਭਗਵੰਤ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਾਵਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: aupadesan sam mitr satrah bhagavant bhagat bhaavanee |
lines.english: They share the Teachings with friend and enemy alike; they love the devotional worship of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਨਹ ਸ੍ਰੋਤਿ ਸ੍ਰਵਣੰ ਆਪੁ ਤੵਿਾਗਿ ਸਗਲ ਰੇਣੁਕਹ ॥
lines.translit: par nindaa neh srot sravanan aap tayiaag sagal renukah |
lines.english: They do not listen to slander; renouncing self-conceit, they become the dust of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਟ ਲਖੵਣ ਪੂਰਨੰ ਪੁਰਖਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਸਾਧ ਸ੍ਵਜਨਹ ॥੪੦॥
lines.translit: khatt lakhayan pooranan purakhah naanak naam saadh svajanah |40|
lines.english: Whoever has these six qualities, O Nanak, is called a Holy friend. ||40||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਜਾ ਭੋਗੰਤ ਕੰਦ ਮੂਲੰ ਬਸੰਤੇ ਸਮੀਪਿ ਕੇਹਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: ajaa bhogant kand moolan basante sameep keharah |
lines.english: The goat enjoys eating fruits and roots, but if it lives near a tiger, it is always anxious.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤ੍ਰ ਗਤੇ ਸੰਸਾਰਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋਗ ਹਰਖੰ ਬਿਆਪਤੇ ॥੪੧॥
lines.translit: tatr gate sansaarah naanak sog harakhan biaapate |41|
lines.english: This is the condition of the world, O Nanak; it is afflicted by pleasure and pain. ||41||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮ ਮੋਹੰ ਮਾਨ ਅਪਮਾਨੰ ਮਦੰ ਮਾਯਾ ਬਿਆਪਿਤੰ ॥
lines.translit: bharam mohan maan apamaanan madan maayaa biaapitan |
lines.english: doubt, emotional attachment, pride, dishonor and intoxication with Maya

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਲੰ ਛਿਦ੍ਰੰ ਕੋਟਿ ਬਿਘਨੰ ਅਪਰਾਧੰ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਮਲੰ ॥
lines.translit: chhalan chhidran kott bighanan aparaadhan kilabikh malan |
lines.english: Fraud, false accusations, millions of diseases, sins and the filthy residues of evil mistakes;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲੰ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਹ ਜਪੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਨਾਮੰ ॥
lines.translit: niramalan saadh sangah japant naanak gopaal naaman |
lines.english: Chanting and meditating on the Name of the Lord in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, O Nanak, mortals become immaculate and pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮ੍ਰਿਤੵੁ ਜਨਮ ਭ੍ਰਮੰਤਿ ਨਰਕਹ ਅਨਿਕ ਉਪਾਵੰ ਨ ਸਿਧੵਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: mritayu janam bhramant narakah anik upaavan na sidhayate |
lines.english: these lead mortals to death and rebirth, wandering lost in hell. In spite of all sorts of efforts, salvation is not found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਰਣ ਸਰਣ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਰਮਣ ਸੀਲ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰਹ ॥
lines.translit: taran saran suaamee raman seel paramesurah |
lines.english: In the Sanctuary of the Kind-hearted Lord, our Transcendent Lord and Master, we are carried across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਮੰਤਿ ਗੁਣ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਨਿਤ ਪ੍ਰਤਹ ॥੪੨॥
lines.translit: ramant gun gobind nit pratah |42|
lines.english: They continually dwell upon the Glorious Praises of God. ||42||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਾਸ ਆਸ ਕਰਣੰ ਸਗਲ ਅਰਥ ਆਲਯਹ ॥
lines.translit: niraas aas karanan sagal arath aalayah |
lines.english: He gives hope to the hopeless. He is the Source of all riches.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਸਿਮਰੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਗਲ ਜਾਚੰਤ ਜਾਚਿਕਹ ॥੪੩॥
lines.translit: gun nidhaan simarant naanak sagal jaachant jaachikah |43|
lines.english: Nanak meditates in remembrance on the Treasure of Virtue; we are all beggars, begging at His Door. ||43||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥਹ ਦਾਨੁ ਦੇਤ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪੂਰਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: karan kaaran samarathah daan det prabh pooranah |
lines.english: God is the Perfect, All-powerful Cause of causes; He is the Giver of gifts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਗਮ ਸਥਾਨ ਸੁਗਮੰ ਮਹਾ ਦੂਖ ਸਰਬ ਸੂਖਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: duragam sathaan sugaman mahaa dookh sarab sookhanah |
lines.english: The most difficult place becomes easy, and the worst pain turns into pleasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਬਚਨ ਭੇਦ ਭਰਮੰ ਸਾਕਤ ਪਿਸਨੰ ਤ ਸੁਰਜਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: durabachan bhed bharaman saakat pisanan ta surajanah |
lines.english: Evil words, differences and doubts are obliterated, and even faithless cynics and malicious gossips become good people.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸਥਿਤੰ ਸੋਗ ਹਰਖੰ ਭੈ ਖੀਣੰ ਤ ਨਿਰਭਵਹ ॥
lines.translit: asathitan sog harakhan bhai kheenan ta nirabhavah |
lines.english: They become steady and stable, whether happy or sad; their fears are taken away, and they are fearless.
